name.full: Rakshak — AI-Powered POSH Workplace Safety Bot for Microsoft Teams

description.short: Report workplace harassment confidentially through empathetic AI conversations. POSH Act compliant.
description.full:
Rakshak (रक्षक — "protector" in Sanskrit) is an AI-powered workplace safety bot for Microsoft Teams that empowers employees to report harassment through empathetic, guided conversations — not cold web forms or compromised HR email IDs.

**What Rakshak does:**
• Guides employees through confidential, AI-powered complaint intake conversations
• Auto-generates legally structured complaints under the POSH Act, 2013
• Routes complaints directly to the Internal Complaints Committee (ICC)
• Escalates automatically if the ICC fails to acknowledge or act — a built-in dead man's switch that goes to the Audit Committee and District Officer
• Tracks complaint lifecycle with real-time status updates
• Detects criminal threshold (BNS Sections 74–79) and flags for law enforcement referral
• Supports evidence upload — screenshots, emails, documents
• Generates data for mandatory Board annual report disclosures (Companies Rules 2025)

**Legal compliance built in:**
• Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act, 2013
• Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023 — Sections 74–79
• Companies (Accounts) Second Amendment Rules, 2025
• Companies Act, 2013 — Section 177(9-10) vigil mechanism
• Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023

**Why Rakshak exists:** In a widely reported case (2026), multiple women at a major Indian IT company were harassed for years while HR suppressed complaints. Existing POSH tools digitize the process for the ICC but leave employees with the same broken reporting channels. Rakshak puts the power on the employee side.

Because complaints shouldn't need courage.
